repositories.name: ijepa
repositories.description: Official codebase for I-JEPA, the Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture. First outlined in the CVPR paper, "Self-supervised learning from images with a joint-embedding predictive architecture."

repositories.name: antibiomimetic-texture-vs-shape
repositories.description: Investigate how the proportion of "early visual experience" (blurry, achromatic inputs) influences the network's resulting organization and behavior - The original study used blurry, achromatic inputs for the first half of the epochs
